title: citrus medica subsp. limon
intro: Citrus medica subsp. limon, also known as the lemon tree, is a subspecies of the citron tree and a hybrid of Citrus medica and Citrus aurantifolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and preventing infections. The health benefits of Citrus medica subsp. limon include aiding in digestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of the lemon tree include making tea from its leaves, using its peel to make a natural remedy for colds and sore throats, and incorporating its juice into various recipes for its flavor and medicinal benefits.
